rag_rules: Repair only AGREE clauses that directly reference unresolved AADL features or invalid type expressions in the same scope as the diagnostic.
generic_rules: Fix type mismatches by resolving the underlying unresolved identifier, not by modifying types or adding new declarations.
Do not introduce new auxiliary variables or alter architecture to satisfy invalid expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must reference only visible AADL features or locally declared eq helpers.
Assignment or guarantee expressions must have consistent, resolved types on both sides.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new connections, subcomponents, or features to resolve type errors—repair must be minimal and scope-preserving.
